This number does not change during a beneficiary’s lifetime and each number is used only once. 

The BENE_ID is specific to the CCW and is not applicable to any other identification system or data 
source. 

SHORT NAME: BENE_ID 

LONG NAME: BENE_ID 

TYPE: CHAR
